Instructions for patching the ESP8266 SDK for JerryScript and setting up the ESP8266 toolchain.


## Files
- **[ESP-PATCHFORJERRYSCRIPT.md](ESP-PATCHFORJERRYSCRIPT.md.md)**: Instructions for applying a patch to the ESP8266 SDK to adjust memory allocation for JerryScript.
- **[ESP-PREREQUISITES.md](ESP-PREREQUISITES.md.md)**: Instructions for setting up the toolchain and environment to work with the ESP8266 using the Espressif SDK.
